summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RECRA Solutions iteration 10. All features verified working: 1) Flow Selector with 3 flow buttons (recreatie, chalet, fec) on landing page. 2) Flow-specific product filtering: Recreatie=25, Chalet=22, FEC=19 products. 3) All 5 wizard steps clickable and rendering correctly. 4) Supplier matching API returns sorted suppliers with travel costs. 5) Quote calculation includes travel_costs and travel_total fields. 6) Canvas renders products correctly. 7) Leveranciers tab shows matched suppliers with distance and travel cost. 8) RECRA branding correct: header #244628, background #FDF9ED, accent #70C26C. 9) Active flow label updates correctly. 10) RECRA logo returns to flow selector.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ health check returns 200
Backend: GET /api/products returns 25 total products
Backend: GET /api/products?flow=recreatie returns 25 products (all 8 categories)
Backend: GET /api/products?flow=chalet returns 22 products (no slagboom)
Backend: GET /api/products?flow=fec returns 19 products (no sanitair, douchelezer)
Backend: GET /api/suppliers returns 5 suppliers
Backend: POST /api/suppliers/match returns sorted suppliers with travel costs
Backend: POST /api/suppliers/match with category filter works
Backend: POST /api/quote/calculate includes travel_costs array
Backend: POST /api/quote/calculate includes travel_total field
Backend: POST /api/quote/calculate project_total = capex + install + travel
Backend: Project CRUD - create, get, update, delete all working
Frontend: Flow Selector page loads with 3 flow buttons
Frontend: Recreatie flow button navigates to main app
Frontend: Chalet flow button navigates to main app with correct label
Frontend: FEC flow button navigates to main app with correct label
Frontend: Active flow label shows correct text (Recreatie Infra, Chalet & Stay, FEC & Experience)
Frontend: All 5 wizard steps visible and clickable
Frontend: Step 1 (Project) content renders
Frontend: Step 2 (Terrein) content renders
Frontend: Step 3 (Producten) content renders with products list
Frontend: Step 4 (Energie) content renders
Frontend: Step 5 (Offerte) content renders with quote details
Frontend: Canvas renders correctly in Step 3
Frontend: Product click-to-place works
Frontend: Placed products visible on canvas with labels
Frontend: Category select dropdown present
Frontend: Leveranciers tab shows supplier panel
Frontend: Supplier panel shows matched suppliers with distance and travel cost
Frontend: Quote sidebar shows Investering, Lease/mnd, Totaal
Frontend: Step 5 shows Reiskosten in investment breakdown
Frontend: Export PDF button present
Frontend: RECRA logo click returns to flow selector
Frontend: Header color is #244628 (Dark Olive)
Frontend: Background color is #FDF9ED (Cream)
Frontend: Accent color #70C26C visible on buttons and highlights
seed_data_creation: TEST_Quote_Iteration10 project created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 verified all new features: 1) Flow Selector with 3 flows (recreatie, chalet, fec) - each flow filters products by category. Recreatie=25 products (all categories), Chalet=22 (no slagboom), FEC=19 (no sanitair/douchelezer). 2) Supplier matching API at POST /api/suppliers/match returns suppliers sorted by verified status then distance, with travel cost calculation using Haversine formula. 3) Quote calculation at POST /api/quote/calculate now includes travel_costs array (per category, nearest supplier) and travel_total field. project_total = capex + installation + travel. 4) Frontend shows travel costs in Step 5 Offerte under 'Reiskosten Leveranciers' section. 5) RECRA branding: header #244628, background #FDF9ED, accent #70C26C. 6) All wizard steps working. 7) Canvas product placement working. 8) Supplier panel in right sidebar shows matched suppliers with distance and travel cost.
